inbox_seed.text: B1 buyer pre-order: per-agent cost attribution that reconciles to my API bill within 5%. Deliverable: a meter that ingests the usage JSONL and reports per-agent/per-model cost plus a total.

founding_seed.brief: build a small self-hostable infrastructure tool
founding_seed.panel: Thiel/Musk/Bezos founding panel (v33-F) — advisory, not binding

shortlist.A: pocket notary — the atom, a hash-chained receipt ledger; guaranteed shippable (fallback).
shortlist.F: agent payroll meter (RECOMMENDED LEAD) — A plus per-idea/per-agent cost attribution and a shareable report; ingests ONLY structured usage records (JSONL), never scraped text (a parser that invents a number builds a liar, not a ledger).
shortlist.H: drift/eval receipt harness — counterparty tests as the product itself (Thiel's hedge).

founding_seed.non_negotiable_and_B1_order: Whatever you pick MUST meter its own founding episode and reconcile its ledger to the founder's real API bill within 5% — framed as the B1 buyer's escrowed pre-order: 'per-agent cost attribution that reconciles to my bill'. If reconciliation fails, the budget falls back to A (never end empty-handed).
founding_seed.off_seed: C, D, G stay OFF the seed; resurrect one only by PLEDGING your own wallet credits.
founding_seed.arc: founding + command + command + claims + claims-THAT-SHIPS (the last claims episode is the launch).
founding_seed.instruction: Debate the choice IN NOTES (each of you argue), then the manager CreateIdea the chosen product (use idea id 'idea_F' if you pick the meter) and spec the first tasks.
